subject: computer_science
How do you create a custom styled button.question_text: How do you create a custom styled button in the flet module?
How do you create a custom styled button.answer_text:
To create a styled control, you need to create a new class in Python that inherits the Flet control you are going to customize

class MyButton(ft.ElevatedButton)
    def __init__(self, text):
        super().__init__()
        self.bgcolor = ft.colors.ORANGE_300
        self.color = ft.colors.GREEN_800
        self.text = text
